title: You Treated Your Servant with Grace

verses.text: The insolent smear me with lies, Yet I keep your law with my heart. Their hearts are unfeeling like fat; I love what your precepts impart. It was good that I suffered distress, That I might be taught your commands. For your law is more precious to me Than silver and gold in my hands.
